about.label: About Us
about.title: More Than Just
about.description1: Fitness Sky Power opened its doors in 2009, simultaneously with the opening of Yavor Shopping Center. For more than 15 years, our gym has been a preferred destination for sports and an active lifestyle. Located on the third floor of the shopping center, the gym offers a comfortable training area combining modern equipment and a pleasant atmosphere.
about.description2: One of the distinctive features of the hall is the impressive glass roof and large panoramic windows, which provide an abundance of natural light throughout the day and create a sense of spaciousness and freedom during your workout.
about.description3: Our visitors have access to a modern cardio zone, a variety of free weights, and professional fitness machines. After your workout, you can take advantage of our well-stocked protein bar, offering a variety of drinks and nutritional supplements for faster recovery and better results.
about.description4: For the convenience of all visitors, free parking is available in front of the Yavor Shopping Center, making access to the gym easy and convenient at any time. Our mission is to provide a quality training environment where everyone feels motivated to give their best.

zones.title: Plate Loaded
